summary: Stunning Europe ’72 Hamburg show with a crystal‑clear soundboard transfer and multiple standout moments (Good Lovin', Big Boss Man, Dark Star→Sugar Magnolia→Caution).
review: The miller.125888 FLAC is widely praised as an excellent soundboard upgrade – crisp, balanced and faithful to the mix, with only minor flaws noted by a single reviewer. Musically the concert is considered one of the tour’s highlights: Pigpen shines on Good Lovin' and Mr. Charlie, the band locks in on Dark Star→Sugar Magnolia→Caution and delivers ace performances of Big Boss Man, Greatest Story Ever Told, He's Gone (with bridge) and Sugar Magnolia.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high star ratings (mostly 5), numerous detailed compliments on both performance and audio quality, and only minimal criticism give a strong case for an above‑average to excellent rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, well‑balanced mix; praised as a major upgrade over previous sources. One reviewer mentions "a few flaws" but overall the transfer is described as wonderful and very listenable.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
poor_songs: Next Time You See Me (not the best version)
show_quality.setlist_flow: Two long, high‑energy sets typical of Europe ’72; a solid first set that warms up with Pigpen’s charge on Mr. Charlie and Big Boss Man, followed by an ace second set opened by Greatest Story Ever Told and highlighted by the flowing Dark Star→Sugar Magnolia→Caution sequence.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Repeatedly praised for wailing guitar work and perfect tone; described as a full‑sound lead element.
band_member_comments.Phil: Noted for singing "his butt off" and delivering powerful vocal moments.
band_member_comments.Bob: Mentioned getting deep into the lyrics and providing strong rhythm guitar support.
band_member_comments.Keys: Keith is called “another lead” that adds to the band’s full sound; his presence is felt clearly in the mix.
band_member_comments.Drums: Bill (Mickey) described as solid, tying the whole performance together.
